inputs.prompt: Speaker: James Chen, CEO, Clearwater Analytics. Occasion: Press launch of the AI budget forecasting tool, Manchester Town Hall. Audience: Journalists, local government finance professionals, technology press. Key messages: 1) Public money deserves the same analytical tools as private money. 2) This tool was built with and for local government, not adapted from the private sector. Length: 5 minutes. Register: Confident, direct, accessible to non-technical audience.

Speaker: Helen Cross, Director, Riverside Arts Centre. Occasion: Re-opening after renovation. Audience: Community members, donors, local press. Key messages: 1) This building belongs to the community. 2) Thank the lottery fund and volunteers. Length: 3 minutes. Register: Warm, community-focused.

Speaker: Dr. Ingrid Nørgaard, Executive Director, Nordic Health Initiative. Occasion: EU Health Summit plenary session, Brussels. Audience: 400 delegates — health ministers, EU officials, researchers, healthcare industry. Key messages: 1) Cross-border research works and we have 17 years of evidence. 2) The EU must treat health research as infrastructure, not discretionary spending. 3) The Baltic expansion proves the model is scalable beyond Scandinavia. Length: 8 minutes. Register: Authoritative, direct, optimistic but evidence-grounded. The speaker is experienced on stage.
